race.comment: Tough race with plenty of different form angles. BRIDAL WALTZ (10) returned from a lengthy break with a sharp victory over 1000m at Flemington in fast time. Drops 8.5kg for this and has a G3 win on the CV. Will hold a forward spot and sure to be thereabouts. ENRICHED (12) ran second to Autumn Glow in the Darby Munro on this day last year. Cherry-ripe now after taking good ground off King Of Roseau in the G3 Liverpool Cup over 1300m at Randwick. Tongue-tie goes on and has solid each way claims. GRAFTERBURNERS (14) gritty Queensland colt unbeaten at his last four starts. Demolished a handy field over this trip in the Sunlight Stakes at the Gold Coast in January. Back with a 1000m trial placing and the booking of Zac Lloyd is a good lead. RESERVE BANK (5) Group 1 Goodwood winner last May returning from a lengthy spell. Fitted with the two trials and gets every chance with Damian Lane aboard from the good gate.
